commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the bash background-session name tokenizer regex and adds deriveSessionName tests for quoted commands, backslashes, and malicious unterminated quoted input.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +26. Total +26 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. A high-confidence source reproduction is to call deriveSessionName with `node "` plus a long run of backslashes; current main has the ambiguous regex and the linked source PR shows growing before-fix timings.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair job is needed; the PR can proceed through exact-head automerge checks and mergeability gates.
